## Bug Description
A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

2. Click on '...'
3. See error

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

- Browser: [e.g., Chrome 120]
- Deployment: [Local / Docker / Render+Vercel]
- Version: [e.g., v1.0.0]
